label: About
title: About Unknowns Rupture Map
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 103 recent saved-signal files and 78 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Article cover image and AI skills for building software factories, plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Unknowns Rupture Map: Nocturnal unknowns rupture map, a game-space surface seen as architectural section: vast matte black field violently cut open by one bone-white gridded continent. A rising black route curve crosses the pale tear with punctured nodes, two hero-scale apertures, triangle warnings, and fogged question wells. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large pale gridded torn-map slab, lower-left circular origin aperture, and upper hollow check ring on route.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
